title: Advanced Welding Techniques for Industrial Sheds
excerpt: Latest MIG/TIG methods for structural integrity and longevity in fabrication projects.
author: Malik Fabrication Team
content:
In industrial shed fabrication, welding quality determines 80% of structural longevity. Advanced pulsed MIG with 85% Ar/15% CO2 achieves deeper penetration (12-15mm) and 40% fewer defects.

TechniquePenetrationSpeedBest For
Pulsed MIG15mm2.5m/minMain framework
TIG8mm0.8m/minCritical joints

Parameters

  • Wire: ER70S-6 1.2mm
  • Voltage: 26-28V

AWS D1.1 certified. Contact for weld qualification.

title: Custom Grill Design Trends 2024
excerpt: Contemporary grill designs combining security, aesthetics, fabrication precision.
author: Design Team
content:
2024 trends: minimalist geometric patterns, 50x50mm hollow sections.

ApplicationMaterialFinish

Laser cut, TIG weld, powder coated. Delivered 120+ projects.

title: Boundary Wall Fabrication Guide
excerpt: Steel grades and techniques for durable boundary solutions.
author: Engineering Dept.
content:
Engineering for wind/impact loads: IS2062 B (250MPa), S355JR (355MPa).

Panel 2.4m H, 100x50mm posts, PCC foundation. Load tested 3.2 kN/m².

Free structural drawings with quote.

title: Future of Metal Fabrication
author: Innovation Lead
content:
